Surname.en: Automaton who Dreams of Clear Skies
Surname.jp: 蒼空を夢見る自動人形

name.jp: オンスロットドライブ

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>75%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>75%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>75%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>75%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: (Triggered Effect) Counterattacks all enemies when attacked.\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>, and has a <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> chance each to inflict 2 <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> effects on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nThe counterattack effect is only activated once <color=#28d9ed>per turn</color>.
description.kr: (발동 효과) 공격 당할 시 적 전체에게 반격합니다.\n자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가하고, 각각 <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> 확률로 적 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 2개 부여합니다.\n반격은 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color>에 한 번만 발동합니다.
description.jp: (発動効果)攻撃を受けた場合、敵全体に反撃する。\n自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPし、敵全体にそれぞれ<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>2個を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。\n反撃は<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>に1回発動する。
description.zh: (触发效果)受到攻击时,对全体敌人发动反击。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>,并各有<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>的几率对全体敌人造成2个<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>仅能发动1次反击。

name.jp: ディストーションレイ

description.en: Attacks all enemies.\nIf the target is inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color>, damage dealt increases, and <color=#28d9ed>detonates</color> all <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> stacks on the target after attacking.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n대상이 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color> 상태라면 피해량이 증가하고, 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 모두 <color=#28d9ed>폭발</color>시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\n対象が<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>状態の場合、ダメージがUPし、攻撃後に<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>をすべて<color=#28d9ed>破裂</color>させる。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。\n若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>状态,则使伤害量提升,攻击后使所有<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果<color=#28d9ed>爆炸</color>。

name.jp: イプシロンの複合強化 V

description.en: (Passive Effect) Increases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance and Critical Damage</color> by <color=#28d9ed>2% and 3%</color> respectively, when gaining a turn (Max 10 stacks).\nIncreases Attack by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> when gaining a turn.
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 턴 획득 시, <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률, 치명 피해</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>2%, 3% </color> 증가합니다.(최대 10회 누적)\n턴 획득 시, 공격력이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)ターン開始時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>2%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心ダメージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>UPする。(最大10回累積)\nターン獲得時、攻撃力が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)获得回合时,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率、暴击伤害</color>分别提升<color=#28d9ed>2%、3%</color>。(最多可叠加10次)\n获得回合时,攻击力提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。

description.en:
Becomes <color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color> when Health drops to <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> of Max Health or lower. 

<color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color>: After removing buffs from all enemies, attacks all enemies and inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> twice for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
After Enraged, permanently increases <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color>/<color=#28d9ed>Speed</color>, significantly reduces <color=#28d9ed>damage taken</color>, and summons Tanya.
Removes all buffs and immediately inflicts Break when Tanya is defeated.
description.kr:
최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 이하가 되면 <color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> 상태로 전환합니다. 

<color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> : 적 전체의 강화 효과를 제거한 뒤, 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 2개 부여합니다.
광폭화 이후 영구적으로 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>/<color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 증가하고 <color=#28d9ed>받는 피해</color>가 크게 감소하며 타니아를 소환합니다.
타니아 처치 시 모든 강화 효과가 해제되고 즉시 브레이크 상태로 전환합니다.
description.jp:
最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>以下になると<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>状態に切り替わる。

<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>:敵全体の強化効果を解除した後、敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>2個を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
【狂暴化】後、<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>と<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>が永続的にUPし、<color=#28d9ed>受けるダメージ</color>が大幅にDOWNする。さらに【タニア】を召喚する。
【タニア】が倒れた場合、強化効果が解除され、ブレイク状態になる。
description.zh:
若生命值降至上限的<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>以下,则转换为<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>状态。

<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>:解除全体敌人的强化效果后,攻击全体敌人并造成2个<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
转换为狂暴化后,使<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>/<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>永久提升,<color=#28d9ed>所受伤害</color>大幅降低,并召唤塔尼娅。
击杀塔尼娅后,解除所有强化效果,并立即转换为力竭状态。
